title: CSS Variables as Fill Colors

chart.options: chart: { type: 'area', height: 350 }, colors: [ 'var(--chart-primary)', 'var(--chart-secondary)', 'var(--chart-tertiary)', ], fill: { type: 'solid', opacity: 0.3 }, stroke: { curve: 'smooth', width: 2 }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, xaxis: { categories: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun'] }, legend: { position: 'top' },

chart: { type: 'donut', height: 350 }, colors: [ 'var(--chart-primary)', 'var(--chart-secondary)', 'var(--chart-tertiary)', ], labels: ['Desktop', 'Tablet', 'Mobile'], fill: { opacity: 1 }, legend: { position: 'bottom' },
